Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart At a Glance Fully Assembled Concrete tabletop Description About This Product Embodying organic modernism, this sculptural coffee table features a striking cantilevered silhouette crafted from solid concrete. Its stone-like texture and sand-toned finish make it a durable, architectural centerpiece for minimalist living rooms or outdoor patios. Beyond its sculptural appeal, this table is engineered for real-world longevity. The solid concrete material is finished with a protective coating that resists moisture and sun damage, making it a practical choice for indoor-outdoor living. Its neutral sand hue and tactile finish complement a variety of styles, from industrial lofts to coastal retreats. Whether used as a functional surface for drinks on the terrace or as an artful centerpiece indoors, this table delivers both visual impact and enduring quality. Features Organic Sculptural Design: The table showcases a free-form silhouette with an asymmetric, cantilevered top that mimics the artistry of hand-shaped stone, serving as a bold statement piece. Solid Concrete Construction: Cast from high-quality, 100% premium concrete with a substantial 156 lb net weight, ensuring exceptional stability and wind resistance for terraces and open gardens. Weather-Resistant Finish: Treated with a specialized water-based paint, the surface offers water resistance and UV resistance, protecting the sand-toned finish from fading in outdoor elements. Versatile Statement Piece: Designed to bridge the gap between industrial durability and Scandinavian elegance, this table transitions seamlessly from indoor lounges to covered patios. Textured Stone Effect: The tactile surface provides a natural stone look similar to travertine, adding warmth and depth to contemporary or minimalist interiors. Functional Durability: The spacious rectangular tabletop supports up to 200 lbs, offering a reliable surface for entertaining guests or displaying decor in high-traffic areas. No Assembly Required: Arrives fully assembled as a single, robust piece, allowing for immediate placement without the need for tools or complex setup.
